metadata.title: Task Genius
metadata.description: A task progress bar plugin for tasks in Obsidian.

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle this to allow this plugin to add progress bar for Task below the headings."
regex.target: .setDesc("开启此选项，允许该插件在标题行为任务添加进度条。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle this to allow this plugin to add tasks number to progress bar."
regex.target: .setDesc("开启这个允许这个插件添加任务编号到进度条。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle this to allow this plugin to count the tasks in one level, but not in sub-levels."
regex.target: .setDesc("开启此选项以允许此插件计算一个级别的任务，而不是子级别的任务。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle this to allow this plugin to treat different tasks mark as completed or uncompleted tasks."
regex.target: .setDesc("开启此选项以允许此插件将不同的任务标记视为已完成或未完成的任务。"
.setDesc('在此处设置已完成的替代标记。例如 "x|X|-"'

regex.source: .setDesc("If you like this plugin, consider donating to support continued development:"
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你喜欢这个插件，可以考虑捐赠来支持继续开发:"

regex.source: .setName("Count sub children level of current Task")
.setDesc("Toggle this to allow this plugin to count sub tasks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换此选项以允许此插件计数子任务。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Toggle this to allow this plugin to show percentage in the progress bar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换此选项以允许此插件在进度条中显示百分比。")
text:"\u{1F4CD} 任务进度条（Fendi 2024-09-23 汉化）"
